name: Altai Republic (Russia)

colors.symbolism: purity, the eternal snows of the Altai mountains, and the wisdom of the Altai people
the sky, the rivers, and the lakes of the republic

description: A white field with a narrow blue stripe near the bottom and a wider blue stripe along the lower edge, separated by a thin white band.
history: Adopted on 2 July 1992 by the Supreme Soviet of the Altai Republic, the flag is based on the colours of the regional coat of arms.

features.symbolism: white evokes the eternal snows of the Altai mountains and purity; blue evokes the sky, rivers, and lakes of the republic.
